title: Dinky
writer: Harry Sauber, John Fante, Frank Fenton
actors: Jackie Cooper, Mary Astor, Roger Pryor
plot: Mrs. Daniels has been framed on a fraud charge and sent to prison. By bundling her son Dinky off to military school, she is able to keep her shame a secret from him. Upon learning the truth, our young hero voluntarily pulls out of...
